notes: The game was laggy on majority of maps. And also sometimes crashes on map loading. But I was at least able to play it with Steam Controller.
title: Trackmania² Lagoon

gpu: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1060 with Max-Q Design
notes: The games, works perfect. However, i have to put down Anti-aliasing from 8 to 4. Before the game crashed sometimes. With Anti-aliasing 4 works without issues.
title: Trackmania² Lagoon

notes: All TM2 environments runs perfectly out of the box. Steam Workshop content included.
